REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1267 Goettingen Street, Sf Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-13-296886 The Estate of John Joseph Carroll and PES-13-297363 The Estate of Catherine Carroll Callejo.

Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

The Court noted that the Department of Health Services requested special notice in the Estate of John Joseph Carroll but that it does not preclude going forward with the sale. Each Estate owns a 50% interest in the property. The sale is for 100% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $557,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 1, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Assignments And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Apperances: Giulio Accornero for 5 heirs and American Research Bureau.

The Court stated that what is at issue is that Mr. Accornero represents the heirs and the American Research Bureau and that at the time of distribution, a problem with assignment may arise. Mr. Accornero reported that his clients have their interest aligned, that the concern of negotiating a percentage is not at issue and that he will work with both clients until a conflict occurs.

The Court instructed Mr. Accornero to provide the addresses of the beneficiaries. The status on filing of the assignments and proof of service is taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Giulio Accornero for five Paternal Heirs.

Mr. Accornero addressed the issue of conflict with his representation of the five Heirs and American Research Bureau. The Court granted Mr. Ferdon's Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Continued To Feb-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Giulio Accornero for five Paternal Heirs.

The Court stated that the difference in the Carroll Estate is that the Heirs got direct notice and in this Estate notice is being provided to Mr. Accornero. Mr. Ferdon stated that they have noticed the Heirs that they know of and have information on, that more parties keep coming forward from the Carroll Estate, and expressed concern about the property being vacant and the possibility of the property being invaded. Mr. Accornero stated that he has nominations and consents to act from his Clients (five individuals). The Court stated that signed consents from Mr. Accornero's Clients that notice can go to Mr. Accornero and not to the them is needed. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to February 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Ferdon to notice all five individuals.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Continued To Jan-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
